top_signals.title: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound
top_signals.summary: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
